text:
(1) Motorcycles and motor-driven cycles need not be equipped with parking brakes.

(2) The wheel of a sidecar attached to a motorcycle or to a motor-driven cycle, and the front wheel of a motor-driven cycle, need not be equipped with brakes, provided that such motorcycle or motor-driven cycle is capable of complying with the performance requirements of this chapter.
markdown:
### Chapter 316. State Unif. Traffic Control
##### § 316.440 — Brake equipment required

(1) Motorcycles and motor-driven cycles need not be equipped with parking brakes.

(2) The wheel of a sidecar attached to a motorcycle or to a motor-driven cycle, and the front wheel of a motor-driven cycle, need not be equipped with brakes, provided that such motorcycle or motor-driven cycle is capable of complying with the performance requirements of this chapter.

subsections.text: Motorcycles and motor-driven cycles need not be equipped with parking brakes.

The wheel of a sidecar attached to a motorcycle or to a motor-driven cycle, and the front wheel of a motor-driven cycle, need not be equipped with brakes, provided that such motorcycle or motor-driven cycle is capable of complying with the performance requirements of this chapter.
